author: ivanlitteri
content: Hey! I'll be doing some local testing with ethrex x (lighthouse + prysm) for 8025. I think I have the correct kurtosis config for lighthouse here https://github.com/eth-act/lighthouse/blob/feat/eip8025/scripts/local_testnet/network_params_eip8025_zkboost.yaml, but I couldn't find prysm's
